---
title: "Time Series"
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js@4.4.4/dist/chart.umd.min.js"></script>
---

```{=html}
<script src="https://unpkg.com/papaparse@5.4.1/papaparse.min.js"></script>

<p style="max-width:780px;margin:0 auto 1.5rem;color:var(--c-text-muted);font-size:0.95rem;">
  Build historical trends across census years (1861, 1871, 1881, 1901, 1911, 1921, 1931, 1936, 1961). Pick a geographic level — national, macro-area, region, or individual provinces — then choose an indicator. Ratio indices are recomputed from aggregated counts, so they remain comparable across geographies.
</p>

<div class="series-controls">
  <div class="series-control">
    <label for="seriesLevel">Geography</label>
    <select id="seriesLevel">
      <option value="italy">Italy (national total)</option>
      <option value="macro">Macro-area</option>
      <option value="region">Region</option>
      <option value="province">Province</option>
    </select>
  </div>

  <div class="series-control" id="seriesPickWrap">
    <label for="seriesPick"><span id="seriesPickLabel">Select</span>
      <span class="hint">(Ctrl / Cmd-click for multiple)</span></label>
    <select id="seriesPick" multiple size="8"></select>
  </div>

  <div class="series-control">
    <label for="seriesMetric">Indicator</label>
    <select id="seriesMetric">
      <optgroup label="Population">
        <option value="total_pop">Total population</option>
        <option value="male_pop">Male population</option>
        <option value="female_pop">Female population</option>
      </optgroup>
      <optgroup label="Demographic indices">
        <option value="cwr">Child/Woman Ratio (‰)</option>
        <option value="old_dep">Old-age dependency (%)</option>
        <option value="struct_dep">Structural dependency (%)</option>
        <option value="mean_age">Mean age (years)</option>
      </optgroup>
      <optgroup label="Age groups (count)">
        <option value="t_0">Age 0</option>
        <option value="t_1_4">Age 1–4</option>
        <option value="t_5_9">Age 5–9</option>
        <option value="t_10_14">Age 10–14</option>
        <option value="t_15_19">Age 15–19</option>
        <option value="t_20_24">Age 20–24</option>
        <option value="t_25_29">Age 25–29</option>
        <option value="t_30_34">Age 30–34</option>
        <option value="t_35_39">Age 35–39</option>
        <option value="t_40_44">Age 40–44</option>
        <option value="t_45_49">Age 45–49</option>
        <option value="t_50_54">Age 50–54</option>
        <option value="t_55_59">Age 55–59</option>
        <option value="t_60_64">Age 60–64</option>
        <option value="t_65_69">Age 65–69</option>
        <option value="t_70_74">Age 70–74</option>
        <option value="t_75_79">Age 75–79</option>
        <option value="t_80_84">Age 80–84</option>
        <option value="t_85plus">Age 85+</option>
      </optgroup>
    </select>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="series-chart-wrap">
  <canvas id="seriesChart"></canvas>
  <div id="seriesEmpty" class="series-empty">Select at least one geography to render a series.</div>
</div>

<script>
const YEARS = [1861, 1871, 1881, 1901, 1911, 1921, 1931, 1936, 1961];

// COD_PROV -> {region, macro}. Codes follow ISTAT numbering; we use modern
// regions/macro-areas so that historical name changes (Girgenti -> Agrigento,
// Aquila -> L'Aquila, etc.) collapse into the same bucket across years.
const NO = 'Nord-Ovest', NE = 'Nord-Est', CE = 'Centro', SU = 'Sud', IS = 'Isole';
const REGION_MAP = {
   1: {r: 'Piemonte',           m: NO},
   2: {r: 'Piemonte',           m: NO},
   3: {r: 'Piemonte',           m: NO},
   4: {r: 'Piemonte',           m: NO},
   5: {r: 'Piemonte',           m: NO},
   6: {r: 'Piemonte',           m: NO},
   7: {r: "Valle d'Aosta",       m: NO},
   8: {r: 'Liguria',            m: NO},
   9: {r: 'Liguria',            m: NO},
  10: {r: 'Liguria',            m: NO},
  11: {r: 'Liguria',            m: NO},
  12: {r: 'Lombardia',          m: NO},
  13: {r: 'Lombardia',          m: NO},
  14: {r: 'Lombardia',          m: NO},
  15: {r: 'Lombardia',          m: NO},
  16: {r: 'Lombardia',          m: NO},
  17: {r: 'Lombardia',          m: NO},
  18: {r: 'Lombardia',          m: NO},
  19: {r: 'Lombardia',          m: NO},
  20: {r: 'Lombardia',          m: NO},
  21: {r: 'Trentino-Alto Adige', m: NE},
  22: {r: 'Trentino-Alto Adige', m: NE},
  23: {r: 'Veneto',             m: NE},
  24: {r: 'Veneto',             m: NE},
  25: {r: 'Veneto',             m: NE},
  26: {r: 'Veneto',             m: NE},
  27: {r: 'Veneto',             m: NE},
  28: {r: 'Veneto',             m: NE},
  29: {r: 'Veneto',             m: NE},
  30: {r: 'Friuli-Venezia Giulia', m: NE},
  31: {r: 'Friuli-Venezia Giulia', m: NE},
  32: {r: 'Friuli-Venezia Giulia', m: NE},
  33: {r: 'Emilia-Romagna',     m: NE},
  34: {r: 'Emilia-Romagna',     m: NE},
  35: {r: 'Emilia-Romagna',     m: NE},
  36: {r: 'Emilia-Romagna',     m: NE},
  37: {r: 'Emilia-Romagna',     m: NE},
  38: {r: 'Emilia-Romagna',     m: NE},
  39: {r: 'Emilia-Romagna',     m: NE},
  40: {r: 'Emilia-Romagna',     m: NE},
  41: {r: 'Marche',             m: CE},
  42: {r: 'Marche',             m: CE},
  43: {r: 'Marche',             m: CE},
  44: {r: 'Marche',             m: CE},
  45: {r: 'Toscana',            m: CE},
  46: {r: 'Toscana',            m: CE},
  47: {r: 'Toscana',            m: CE},
  48: {r: 'Toscana',            m: CE},
  49: {r: 'Toscana',            m: CE},
  50: {r: 'Toscana',            m: CE},
  51: {r: 'Toscana',            m: CE},
  52: {r: 'Toscana',            m: CE},
  53: {r: 'Toscana',            m: CE},
  54: {r: 'Umbria',             m: CE},
  55: {r: 'Umbria',             m: CE},
  56: {r: 'Lazio',              m: CE},
  57: {r: 'Lazio',              m: CE},
  58: {r: 'Lazio',              m: CE},
  59: {r: 'Lazio',              m: CE},
  60: {r: 'Lazio',              m: CE},
  61: {r: 'Campania',           m: SU},
  62: {r: 'Campania',           m: SU},
  63: {r: 'Campania',           m: SU},
  64: {r: 'Campania',           m: SU},
  65: {r: 'Campania',           m: SU},
  66: {r: 'Abruzzo',            m: SU},
  67: {r: 'Abruzzo',            m: SU},
  68: {r: 'Abruzzo',            m: SU},
  69: {r: 'Abruzzo',            m: SU},
  70: {r: 'Molise',             m: SU},
  71: {r: 'Puglia',             m: SU},
  72: {r: 'Puglia',             m: SU},
  73: {r: 'Puglia',             m: SU},
  74: {r: 'Puglia',             m: SU},
  75: {r: 'Puglia',             m: SU},
  76: {r: 'Basilicata',         m: SU},
  77: {r: 'Basilicata',         m: SU},
  78: {r: 'Calabria',           m: SU},
  79: {r: 'Calabria',           m: SU},
  80: {r: 'Calabria',           m: SU},
  81: {r: 'Sicilia',            m: IS},
  82: {r: 'Sicilia',            m: IS},
  83: {r: 'Sicilia',            m: IS},
  84: {r: 'Sicilia',            m: IS},
  85: {r: 'Sicilia',            m: IS},
  86: {r: 'Sicilia',            m: IS},
  87: {r: 'Sicilia',            m: IS},
  88: {r: 'Sicilia',            m: IS},
  89: {r: 'Sicilia',            m: IS},
  90: {r: 'Sardegna',           m: IS},
  91: {r: 'Sardegna',           m: IS},
  92: {r: 'Sardegna',           m: IS}
};

const MACROS = [NO, NE, CE, SU, IS];

// Fields aggregated as raw sums across selected provinces.
const COUNT_FIELDS = ['total_pop','male_pop','female_pop'];
const AGE_SUFFIXES = ['0','1_4','5_9','10_14','15_19','20_24','25_29','30_34','35_39','40_44','45_49','50_54','55_59','60_64','65_69','70_74','75_79','80_84','85plus'];
AGE_SUFFIXES.forEach(a => { ['m_','f_','t_'].forEach(p => COUNT_FIELDS.push(p+a)); });

const AGE_MIDPOINTS = {'0':0.5,'1_4':2.5,'5_9':7,'10_14':12,'15_19':17,'20_24':22,'25_29':27,'30_34':32,'35_39':37,'40_44':42,'45_49':47,'50_54':52,'55_59':57,'60_64':62,'65_69':67,'70_74':72,'75_79':77,'80_84':82,'85plus':87.5};
const FERTILE_F = ['f_15_19','f_20_24','f_25_29','f_30_34','f_35_39','f_40_44'];
const CHILD_T = ['t_0','t_1_4'];
const YOUNG_T = ['t_0','t_1_4','t_5_9','t_10_14'];
const WORKING_T = ['t_15_19','t_20_24','t_25_29','t_30_34','t_35_39','t_40_44','t_45_49','t_50_54','t_55_59','t_60_64'];
const OLD_T = ['t_65_69','t_70_74','t_75_79','t_80_84','t_85plus'];

// Palette for series lines; cycles if more series than colors.
const PALETTE = ['#1e40af','#be185d','#15803d','#b45309','#7c3aed','#0e7490','#9f1239','#4d7c0f','#1d4ed8','#c2410c'];

let censusByYear = {};   // {year: {cod: row}}
let provinceCanon = {};  // {cod: canonical name}
let chart = null;

async function loadAllCensus() {
  await Promise.all(YEARS.map(async y => {
    const resp = await fetch('data/census/census_' + y + '.csv');
    const text = await resp.text();
    const parsed = Papa.parse(text, {header: true, skipEmptyLines: true, dynamicTyping: true});
    const byCode = {};
    parsed.data.forEach(row => {
      const cod = parseInt(row.COD_PROV);
      const entry = {den_prov: row.DEN_PROV};
      Object.keys(row).forEach(k => {
        if (k !== 'COD_PROV' && k !== 'DEN_PROV') entry[k] = parseFloat(row[k]) || 0;
      });
      byCode[cod] = entry;
    });
    censusByYear[y] = byCode;
  }));
  // Pick canonical names from the most recent census that knows each code,
  // so dropdown labels prefer modern names (Imperia, Agrigento) over
  // archaic ones (Porto Maurizio, Girgenti) when both exist.
  [...YEARS].sort((a, b) => b - a).forEach(y => {
    Object.entries(censusByYear[y] || {}).forEach(([cod, row]) => {
      if (!provinceCanon[cod]) provinceCanon[cod] = row.den_prov;
    });
  });
}

function provincesInRegion(region) {
  return Object.keys(REGION_MAP).filter(c => REGION_MAP[c].r === region).map(Number);
}
function provincesInMacro(macro) {
  return Object.keys(REGION_MAP).filter(c => REGION_MAP[c].m === macro).map(Number);
}
function allProvinces() {
  return Object.keys(REGION_MAP).map(Number);
}
function regionsList() {
  return [...new Set(Object.values(REGION_MAP).map(v => v.r))].sort();
}

function aggregate(yearData, codes) {
  const sums = {};
  COUNT_FIELDS.forEach(f => sums[f] = 0);
  let n = 0;
  codes.forEach(c => {
    const row = yearData[c];
    if (!row) return;
    n++;
    COUNT_FIELDS.forEach(f => sums[f] += (row[f] || 0));
  });
  if (n === 0) return null;
  return sums;
}

function readMetric(agg, metric) {
  if (!agg) return null;
  if (COUNT_FIELDS.includes(metric)) return agg[metric];
  const sumOf = keys => keys.reduce((s, k) => s + (agg[k] || 0), 0);
  if (metric === 'cwr') {
    const w = sumOf(FERTILE_F);
    return w > 0 ? Math.round(sumOf(CHILD_T) / w * 10000) / 10 : null;
  }
  if (metric === 'old_dep') {
    const w = sumOf(WORKING_T);
    return w > 0 ? Math.round(sumOf(OLD_T) / w * 1000) / 10 : null;
  }
  if (metric === 'struct_dep') {
    const w = sumOf(WORKING_T);
    return w > 0 ? Math.round((sumOf(YOUNG_T) + sumOf(OLD_T)) / w * 1000) / 10 : null;
  }
  if (metric === 'mean_age') {
    let wt = 0;
    AGE_SUFFIXES.forEach(a => wt += (agg['t_' + a] || 0) * AGE_MIDPOINTS[a]);
    return agg.total_pop > 0 ? Math.round(wt / agg.total_pop * 10) / 10 : null;
  }
  return null;
}

function seriesForSelection(level, picks, metric) {
  // Returns [{label, codes}].
  if (level === 'italy') return [{label: 'Italy', codes: allProvinces()}];
  if (level === 'macro')
    return picks.map(p => ({label: p, codes: provincesInMacro(p)}));
  if (level === 'region')
    return picks.map(p => ({label: p, codes: provincesInRegion(p)}));
  if (level === 'province')
    return picks.map(p => ({label: provinceCanon[parseInt(p)] || p, codes: [parseInt(p)]}));
  return [];
}

function refreshPicker() {
  const level = document.getElementById('seriesLevel').value;
  const wrap = document.getElementById('seriesPickWrap');
  const pick = document.getElementById('seriesPick');
  const label = document.getElementById('seriesPickLabel');

  pick.innerHTML = '';
  if (level === 'italy') {
    wrap.style.display = 'none';
    return;
  }
  wrap.style.display = '';

  let options = [];
  if (level === 'macro') {
    options = MACROS.map(m => [m, m]);
    label.textContent = 'Macro-areas';
  } else if (level === 'region') {
    options = regionsList().map(r => [r, r]);
    label.textContent = 'Regions';
  } else if (level === 'province') {
    const codes = allProvinces().sort((a, b) => {
      return (provinceCanon[a] || '').localeCompare(provinceCanon[b] || '');
    });
    options = codes.map(c => [String(c), provinceCanon[c] || String(c)]);
    label.textContent = 'Provinces';
  }

  options.forEach(([val, txt]) => {
    const opt = document.createElement('option');
    opt.value = val;
    opt.textContent = txt;
    pick.appendChild(opt);
  });
  // Auto-select the first item so the chart isn't empty on a fresh switch.
  if (pick.options.length > 0) pick.options[0].selected = true;
}

function metricLabel() {
  const sel = document.getElementById('seriesMetric');
  return sel.options[sel.selectedIndex].textContent.trim();
}

function fmtTick(v) {
  if (v === null || v === undefined) return '';
  if (Math.abs(v) >= 1000) return v.toLocaleString('en-US');
  return v;
}

function render() {
  const level = document.getElementById('seriesLevel').value;
  const pick = document.getElementById('seriesPick');
  const picks = Array.from(pick.selectedOptions).map(o => o.value);
  const metric = document.getElementById('seriesMetric').value;

  const series = seriesForSelection(level, picks, metric);
  const empty = document.getElementById('seriesEmpty');
  const canvas = document.getElementById('seriesChart');

  if (series.length === 0) {
    empty.style.display = '';
    canvas.style.display = 'none';
    if (chart) { chart.destroy(); chart = null; }
    return;
  }
  empty.style.display = 'none';
  canvas.style.display = '';

  const datasets = series.map((s, i) => {
    const data = YEARS.map(y => readMetric(aggregate(censusByYear[y], s.codes), metric));
    const color = PALETTE[i % PALETTE.length];
    return {
      label: s.label,
      data: data,
      borderColor: color,
      backgroundColor: color + '22',
      borderWidth: 2,
      tension: 0.18,
      pointRadius: 4,
      pointHoverRadius: 6,
      spanGaps: false   // gap when a year has no data for the selection
    };
  });

  if (chart) chart.destroy();
  chart = new Chart(canvas.getContext('2d'), {
    type: 'line',
    data: {labels: YEARS.map(String), datasets},
    options: {
      responsive: true,
      maintainAspectRatio: false,
      interaction: {mode: 'nearest', intersect: false},
      plugins: {
        title: {display: true, text: metricLabel(), font: {size: 14, weight: 'normal'}, color: '#374151'},
        legend: {position: 'bottom'},
        tooltip: {
          callbacks: {
            label: function(ctx) {
              const v = ctx.parsed.y;
              if (v === null || v === undefined) return ctx.dataset.label + ': —';
              return ctx.dataset.label + ': ' + (Number.isInteger(v) ? v.toLocaleString('en-US') : v.toLocaleString('en-US'));
            }
          }
        }
      },
      scales: {
        x: {title: {display: true, text: 'Census year'}, grid: {display: false}},
        y: {title: {display: true, text: metricLabel()}, beginAtZero: false,
            ticks: {callback: fmtTick}}
      }
    }
  });
}

document.getElementById('seriesLevel').addEventListener('change', () => { refreshPicker(); render(); });
document.getElementById('seriesPick').addEventListener('change', render);
document.getElementById('seriesMetric').addEventListener('change', render);

(async function init() {
  await loadAllCensus();
  refreshPicker();
  render();
})();
</script>
```
